home.hero_subtitle: Discover or commission the exact photograph your work needs — licensed with rights you can trust.
home.beyond_archive_title: When the image does not exist, commission it.
home.beyond_archive_desc: Turn a creative need into a precise brief. We connect your team to trusted photographers who know the place, the moment, and the work.
home.licensing_title: The calm way to manage visual rights.
home.rights_clear_desc: Every use case has a plain-language license, ready for legal teams and global campaigns.
home.one_shared_source_desc: Save, license and organize imagery with the people making the work.
home.cta_title: Start building your visual library today.
home.cta_subtitle: Free to browse. Simple to license. Ready when your ideas are.

search.no_matches_desc: Try a broader term or request a custom shoot.

about.hero_title: Bridging independent photographic talent and global commercial enterprise.
about.mission_text: Our mission is simple: to discover exceptional photographic perspectives from around the globe and integrate them into the international commercial marketplace.
about.cta_subtitle: Submit your portfolio today and turn your artistic vision into high-value commercial assets.

contact.hero_description: Have questions regarding an active evaluation, file format requirements, or your registration status? Contact our corporate departments directly below.
contact.general_acquisition_desc: For general inquiries and portfolio submissions support.
contact.billing_compliance_desc: For payment routing, tax forms, and vendor registration.
contact.fast_track_desc: Connect directly with an available acquisition officer.

pricing.hero_subtitle: License single images à la carte. No recurring subscription lock-ins, complex tokens, or confusing legal terms.

contribute.form_description: Ready to partner with NS CAPTURES? Please fill out the formal acquisition intake form below.
contribute.form_success_desc_1: We've sent a detailed confirmation to
contribute.form_success_desc_2: . Our Content Evaluation Team will begin your Technical Assessment within 3 business days.
contribute.error_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.
contribute.error_valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contribute.error_submission_failed: Failed to submit portfolio. Please try again.

requests.hero_title: When the perfect image doesn't exist yet, commission it.
requests.hero_subtitle: Put a creative brief in front of a trusted network of photographers. Real people, real places, made to order.

account.become_contributor_desc: Ready to share your vision with the world? Upgrade your account to start uploading photos, managing your portfolio, and earning revenue from licenses.

sign_up.title: Create your account
sign_up.success_subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to activate your account.

verification_modal.pending_desc: Your identity documents and payment have been received. An administrator is currently reviewing your application.
verification_modal.rejected_desc: Your previous verification was not approved. Please review the admin feedback and resubmit.
verification_modal.unverified_desc: Complete your verification to unlock your photographer dashboard and start monetizing your work.

footer.tagline: A better visual commons for the ideas moving culture forward.
